Contracting Authority: Bezirkskliniken Schwaben (KU), Geschwister-Schönert-Straße 4, 86156 Augsburg, DE (NUTS DE271)
Project Description:
- Delivery & implementation of an on‑premises Identity and Access Management (IAM) solution incl. services
- Initial 5,000 licenses; option +1,000 within 36 months
- Integration: CGM KIS Medico, Microsoft Active Directory, Exchange, File Server
- Training (DE), service & maintenance; 3rd‑level support by contractor; updates included
- KHZG funding (Fördertatbestand 10) compliance; no SaaS/Cloud; GDPR/BSI/B3S aligned
- Go‑live at all sites by 31.12.2025; contract performance on BKS virtual environment
Important Dates:
- Questions answered ≤6 calendar days before deadline
- Bid validity/binding: 3 months (92 DAYS)
- Public opening: 11/10/2024 15:00 (+00:00)
- Go‑live deadline: 31/12/2025
- Contract term: 36 months + 1×24‑month option (notice ≥6 months before end)
- Payment: 30 days after valid invoice (ZUGFeRD or PDF+CSV)

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- On‑prem IAM; web‑based UI (DE), AD SSO + 2FA; VMware; MS Server 2019/2022; DB preferred: MS SQL Server 2019/2021 (cost‑neutral alternatives allowed)
- Interfaces (standard, no agents/DLLs; vendor APIs):
  - Active Directory (users, groups, contacts, computers, OUs; schema extensible)
  - Microsoft Exchange ≥2019 (mailboxes, calendars, OOF, forwards; signed mail)
  - CGM Medico (staff, users, roles, facilities, OUs, OE groups)
  - CSV; REST out; PowerShell/VBS/CMD/Perl/SSH/Telnet/tcl/Python connectors
  - Fallback: email task to owner if no connector; fully audit‑proof
- Identity lifecycle & workflows:
  - Graphical editor; multi‑level approvals; parallel branches; substitutes
  - Supports approver roles: supervisors, dept. heads, data owners, process owners, DPO, ISO, IT, HR, works council
  - Email notifications; comments for approve/deny
  - Role/permission catalog with speaking names; automated provisioning; data owners with 4‑eyes approval
- Self‑service portals (must):
  - Request/manage roles, permissions, identities
  - Temporary local admin on Windows (domain‑joined) with optional approval
  - Project spaces/teams access management; join requests
  - User self‑care of allowed identity attributes
  - External persons lifecycle with internal sponsor (patron)
- Architecture & security:
  - On‑prem only (no SaaS/Cloud); supports multiple AD domains/forests; no fixed DC; load balancing supported; HA/cluster
  - Mandate separation; tenant‑level workflows; isolated data per tenant; separated networks
  - Transport encryption using buyer PKI; monthly availability 99.5% (max 3.60h outage/month); archive permission events ≥10 years
  - Quarterly patches min.; immediate updates for critical CVEs; IT can backup/restore at any time
- Reporting: dashboards; scheduled/ad‑hoc; export PDF/Excel; custom reports
- Implementation & training:
  - Delivery, install, configuration, integration, tests; commissioning; full documentation
  - On‑site trainings in German; updated materials; detailed training concept in operations manual
  - Overall project plan post‑award; weekly granularity
- Operations & SLAs (must accept):
  - Support times: 9×5 (Mon–Fri 08:00–17:00)
  - Availability: 99.5%/month; RTO 8h; response: P1=1h, P2=2h
  - BKS: 1st/2nd‑level; Contractor: 3rd‑level (config, new functions, fixes, security)
- Compliance & standards (must): KHZG FT10 (prevention/detection/mitigation/awareness), GDPR/DSGVO, BDSG, BSI IT‑Grundschutz, B3S Hospital, SGB V §391, BSIG §8; ISMS alignment
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Licenses: 5,000 initial; option +1,000 within 36 months
- Maintenance/updates: 36 months (up to 6,000 licenses); option +24 months
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: - On‑prem at BKS sites; Augsburg, DE (NUTS DE271); BKS virtual environment
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- KHZG‑Förderrichtlinie (v4, 02.10.2023), FT10
- GDPR/DSGVO, BDSG; Art. 28 DPA (post‑award)
- BSI IT‑Grundschutz; B3S Krankenhaus; SGB V §391; BSIG §8; ISMS
- Transport encryption; 2FA; 10‑year audit retention
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia allowed: § 53 Abs. 9 VgV declaration; name lead; joint and several liability; each member submits Teil B
- Subcontractors: prior consent; notify ≥1 month before start unless named with offer; ensure compliance
- Reliance on third parties (§§ 36, 47 VgV): commitment + full eligibility proofs must be submitted with the offer
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- eSubmission only via: http://www.deutsche-evergabe.de/dashboards/dashboard_off/ec5aeece-2e27-499f-adb7-063b9129144f
- Text form (§ 126b BGB); upload PDF (searchable) and Excel (price sheet)
- Entire offer must be signed; no post/email/fax; DE language
- Q&A via platform; answers up to 6 calendar days before deadline
- Submit manufacturer EULA with offer

Offer Submission Documents: Teil B: Angaben/Erklärungen zum Nachweis der Eignung (filled & signed)
Teil C: Vertrag nebst Anlagen (sign entire offer)
Anlage 2: Anforderungs- & Kriterienkatalog (Leistungsverzeichnis) samt Preisblatt (Excel, filled)
Subcontractor/Third-party commitment form, if applicable (with offer for reliance)
CVs + degree certificates: Project Lead & Deputy
List of Documents: Trade/professional register entry (number, register, place) or statement
Betriebs- & Vermögenshaftpflicht insurance proof (≤12 months old)
Average annual employees (per § 46 Abs. 3 Nr. 8 VgV)
Under/third-party identification & scope; commitment(s) and proofs (if relied upon)
Consent to WRegG query (at award intention)
Any self-cleaning evidence (§125 GWB), if applicable

Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Declare 2021–2023 net turnover for IAM delivery & implementation; provide on request: accounts/extracts

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Provide register number & office if obligated; otherwise declaration
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Required incl. no tax/social arrears; no crimes; no bid-rigging; plus EU 2022/576 Russia-declaration
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name roles/scope; provide commitment + full eligibility proofs with offer when relying on capacity

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Roles: Project Lead; Deputy Project Lead; 3rd‑level IAM engineers/trainers
- Minimum experience: Project Lead ≥4 years IAM (sector‑specific); Deputy ≥2 years IAM (sector‑specific)
- Proofs: short CVs; degree/professional certificates; company affiliation; years’ IAM experience
- Language/support: 1st‑level by BKS in German (C2) 08:00–17:00; Contractor provides qualified DE support for 3rd‑level
- Availability: Project leads reachable Mon–Fri 08:00–17:00; substitutions require prior approval; continuity over contract term
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Provide average annual staff (2021–2023)
- Ensure sufficient capacity to start within 2–6 weeks post‑award and meet go‑live by 31.12.2025
- On‑site training capability in German; 3rd‑level team with IAM expertise
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- Minimum 3 references (performed 31.08.2021–01.09.2024 or later)
- Each reference: IAM delivery ≥3,000 licenses + implementation + service/maintenance
- At least 2 references: IAM with CGM Medico for public/church/non‑profit health entity
- Provide details: client/contact, scope, KIS, licenses, technical integration, value, in‑service date, service period

Company Referrals: - Bidder to submit ≥3 comparable IAM references (Art/size/complexity), each with ≥3,000 licenses; ≥2 with CGM Medico in health sector; period 31.08.2021–01.09.2024+; include client confirmations on request
Award Criteria:
- Evaluation: best price/quality ratio
- Weighting: Price 60% (60 pts); Quality 40% (max 40 pts)
- Quality scoring (examples from LV):
  - Delivery times: project start within 2/4/6 weeks (3/2/1 pts); full implementation within 1/2/3 months after delivery (3/2/1 pts)
  - Features (selected weights): password reset w/ multi‑factor (5); SAP HCM connector w/ rule‑based triggers (5); ATOSS interface (5); password‑reset portal hardening (3); AD+app password reset (2); security Q&A (2); OTP via SMS/email/app (2); time‑bound roles (2); future‑dated assignments (2); recertification process (1) and per‑permission scoping (2); mass operations (1); auto‑role assignment on org. join (2)
- Minimum (A/E) criteria: must all be “Yes”; any “No” = exclusion (e.g., on‑prem, KHZG FT10, SLAs, DE UI, staging, connectors, security)
- Price comparison: gross lifecycle price incl. one‑off and recurring costs (incl. options) from price sheet; tie‑breakers: higher quality points, then lottery
